name: Farsight Alteration

active.name: Trinket
active.effects: Places a visible {{tip|Farsight Ward}} at the target location that grants {{tip|sight}} of the surrounding area, including over [[terrain]] and through [[brush]] and lasting indefinitely. Also grants sight of the area in a 800 radius for 2 seconds. Upon detecting an enemy champion, the ward will increase its sight radius to 800 units and destroy itself after 3 seconds ({{pp|198 to 99|type=average champion level}} second cooldown; 4000 range).

effects_structured.raw: Place a visible Farsight Ward at the target location that grants vision over terrain and through brush indefinitely.
On cast, reveal a 800 radius area for 2 seconds.
If the ward detects an enemy champion, its sight radius becomes 800 and it self-destructs after 3 seconds.
Recharge time scales from 198 to 99 seconds based on average champion level and is affected by item haste.

simpleDescription: Grants increased range and reveals the targetted area

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model: Farsight Alteration is a long-range targeted trinket cast (4000 range) that places a visible persistent ward and separately grants an immediate 2-second area reveal at cast location.
Detection branch: when the Farsight Ward sees an enemy champion, it temporarily expands to 800 sight radius and then self-destructs after 3 seconds.
Acquisition/charge semantics: purchase is gated to level 9 and recharge scales from 198 to 99 seconds by average champion level (item-haste affected).
Wave 120 (2026-02-25): `on_activate` entries with no fixed cooldown now use explicit `activation_cadence` charge-consumption schema.
